title: cephalanthera longifolia f. longibracteata
intro: Cephalanthera longifolia f. longibracteata, also known as the white helleborine or long-bracted white helleborine, is a rare variant of the orchid species Cephalanthera longifolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cephalanthera longifolia f. longibracteata are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations are typically used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
